title: veronica serpyllifolia var. neglecta
intro: Veronica serpyllifolia var. neglecta, also known as small thyme-leaved speedwell, is a perennial herb that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Veronica serpyllifolia var. neglecta include its ability to treat various health issues, such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses.
